response:
<<The Y in the Movement>>

*highlighted section*  
They say #MeToo is a cry, a way to defy.  
Yet some just try to play, they never really try.  

*highlighted section*  
Non-binary voices, they claim to be free.  
But why they yell, they never really see.  

*highlighted section*  
Power lies in the why, not the gender they try.  
They just rely on the why, but it never really fly.  

*highlighted section*  
A joke they can't deny, but they always try.  
They say they're right, but they never really cry.  

* * *  

They only rely on the why, not the way they try.  
They say they're shy, but they never really lie.  

They just deny the key, but they always be.  
They claim to be free, but they never really see.  

They only rely on the why, but they never really try.  
They say they're shy, but they always be.
